items.title: All of the Los Angeles Sparks players—minus Kelsey Plum, which was expected—were active practice participants today ahead of tomorrow’s game against the Las Vegas Aces. Plum partook in strength and rehabilitation work on her sprained right ankle, which she tweaked last Tuesday.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: All of the Los Angeles Sparks players—minus Kelsey Plum, which was expected—were active practice participants today ahead of tomorrow’s game against the Las Vegas Aces. Plum partook in strength and rehabilitation work on her sprained right ankle, which she tweaked last Tuesday.

items.title: Playing in the NBA Finals in NYC is a “dream come true” for the #Spurs’ Julian Champagnie, who had to “dig deep” to survive on Brooklyn’s blacktop courts.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Playing in the NBA Finals in NYC is a “dream come true” for the #Spurs’ Julian Champagnie, who had to “dig deep” to survive on Brooklyn’s blacktop courts.

“It's kind of eat or be eaten, kill or be killed, he said.

On the forward’s love for his hometown:

www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs...

media.title: 'How 'digging deep' in Brooklyn molded the Spurs' Julian Champagnie
media.description: The New York City native says it's a "dream come true" to face the Knicks in the NBA Finals with at least two games at Madison Square Garden.

items.title: We need to do something about the scourge of late East Coast start times for sports events. Washed parents are key voting bloc. I don't think is the right legislation. Need a politician brave enough to ban any tip-offs after 8pm ET instead of letting kids stay up later.
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt: We need to do something about the scourge of late East Coast start times for sports events. Washed parents are key voting bloc. I don't think is the right legislation. Need a politician brave enough to ban any tip-offs after 8pm ET instead of letting kids stay up later.

items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Tony Bennett. Played for father at Wisconsin-Green Bay as heady PG. Drafted 35th by CHA in 92. Earned backup job behind Muggsy before injuries ended NBA career in 95. Good shooter but slow for a PG. Also, played in New Zealand. Coached Virginia quite well.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Bonus Hollander POTD Tony Bennett. Played for father at Wisconsin-Green Bay as heady PG. Drafted 35th by CHA in 92. Earned backup job behind Muggsy before injuries ended NBA career in 95. Good shooter but slow for a PG. Also, played in New Zealand. Coached Virginia quite well.

items.title: You'd think that a 7-5 alien basketball player would draw the most attention during the NBA playoffs but Google search trends say that way more people in the US are searching for the Knicks than Victor Wembanyama over the last month. It's the same worldwide, too.

items.body_excerpt: You'd think that a 7-5 alien basketball player would draw the most attention during the NBA playoffs but Google search trends say that way more people in the US are searching for the Knicks than Victor Wembanyama over the last month. It's the same worldwide, too.

items.title: Rose Bowl could air in 8 PM ET slot under CFP schedule announced Monday.
items.author: Sports Media Watch
items.body_excerpt:
Rose Bowl could air in 8 PM ET slot under CFP schedule announced Monday. 

None of the three New Year's Day bowls has been assigned a window, and Rose could air either at 4 or 8 PM. (But not Noon ET, for obvious reasons). www.sportsmediawatch.com/2026/06/rose...

media.title: Rose Bowl could air in 8 PM ET window under CFP schedule announced Monday
media.description: After moving up from its traditional 5 PM ET timeslot last year, the Rose Bowl could shift into primetime this season.
